source_release: DfE Explore Education Statistics: Pupil absence in schools in England, Academic year 2024/25

absence_rates_by_geographic_level.title: Absence rates by geographic level
absence_rates_by_geographic_level.coverage: Annual local authority, regional and national absence data, 2006/07 to 2024/25.

absence_by_geographic_level_termly.title: Absence by geographic level - termly
absence_by_geographic_level_termly.coverage: Termly local authority, regional and national absence data, 2018/19 autumn term to 2024/25 summer term.

absence_by_pupil_characteristics.title: Absence by pupil characteristics
absence_by_pupil_characteristics.coverage: Annual local authority, regional and national absence by pupil characteristic, 2018/19 to 2024/25.

absence_by_ethnicity_and_fsm.title: Absence by pupil ethnicity and FSM eligibility
absence_by_ethnicity_and_fsm.coverage: National annual absence by ethnicity minor group and FSM eligibility, 2023/24 to 2024/25.
